100.reason: [Loop runs one extra iteration: should be k < i instead of k <= i because i is the count of terms, and array indices go from 0 to i-1]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop runs one extra iteration: should be k < i, not k <= i, because i is the count of terms (0-indexed). Same issue with m <= j below.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [Loop condition should be k < i, not k <= i, because i is the count of terms (0-indexed). Same issue for m <= j.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop condition should be k < i, not k <= i, because i is the count of terms (0-indexed), so valid indices are 0 to i-1. Same issue for m <= j below.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Loop condition should be k < i, not k <= i, because i is the count of terms (0-based index). Same issue for m <= j below. This causes reading beyond valid input data.]

102.reason: [Loop runs one extra iteration: should be m < j instead of m <= j for the same reason]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop runs one extra iteration: should be m < j instead of m <= j for the same reason]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same as above: should be m < j, not m <= j. This causes reading uninitialized elements a[i] and b[j], leading to undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [Loop condition should be m < j, not m <= j, because j is the count of terms (0-indexed).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Same as above: should be m < j, not m <= j. This causes accessing b[j] which is uninitialized (out-of-bounds).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Same as above: should be m < j. Accessing b[j] is out-of-bounds since valid indices are 0 to j-1.]

125.reason: [Output format requires space-separated terms on one line, not newline after each term. Also, zero-coefficient terms may be printed due to incorrect initialization and insertion logic.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Output format requires space-separated terms on one line, not newline after each term. Also, zero-coefficient terms may be printed due to incorrect initialization and insertion logic.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [Printing a trailing newline per term instead of space-separated on one line violates output format. Also prints dummy node if not removed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Output format requires space-separated terms on one line, not newline-separated. Also prints the dummy zero term if not overwritten or removed.]

87.reason: [The initial dummy node with zero coefficient may cause incorrect output if not handled properly during multiplication and printing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [This initializes the list with a dummy node (0x^0), which will interfere with polynomial multiplication logic and cause incorrect output when the actual product has no constant term or when terms cancel out.]

108.reason: [Overwrites the dummy node instead of properly initializing an empty list. If the real product has zero coefficient for this term later, it won't be handled correctly.]

118.reason: [This modifies the node returned by searchNode, but if multiple same-degree terms are added later, they may not be merged correctly due to insertion order and lack of re-sorting after merge. Also, modifying through search result is fragile.]
